compiled_state.title: Implement EAGAIN_PATTERN, _is_eagain_failure, and _retry_eagain_test in suite-engine.sh
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add EAGAIN resource-exhaustion detection and automatic retry to suite-engine.sh using extracted helper functions following the existing _helper convention.

## Implementation

1. Add EAGAIN_PATTERN constant near the top of suite-engine.sh (after sourcing libs):
   EAGAIN_PATTERN="fork: (retry: )?Resource temporarily unavailable|BlockingIOError.*Resource temporarily unavailable"

2. Add _is_eagain_failure() helper (top-level, alongside _run_single_test):
   Takes exit_code and output_file as args. Returns 0 when exit_code==254 AND grep -qE "$EAGAIN_PATTERN" "$output_file".

3. Add _retry_eagain_test() helper (top-level):
   Takes test_path and results_dir as args. Re-runs the test synchronously with MAX_PARALLEL=1 exported via env. Overwrites .out, .exit, and .counts files in results_dir. Returns the new exit code.

4. In _process_completed_test, after reading exit_code (line ~326), BEFORE the existing failure handling (line ~348):
   - Check _is_eagain_failure "$exit_code" "$results_dir/$tname.out"
   - If true: call _retry_eagain_test "$tpath" "$results_dir"
   - Overwrite exit_code with retry result
   - Re-read counts from $results_dir/$tname.counts
   - Log: "EAGAIN retry for $tname: [PASS|FAIL]"
   - Fall through to existing logic with updated exit_code

5. If retry passes (exit 0), the result is authoritative — the test is treated as passed. No special handling needed beyond updating exit_code to 0.

## Files to Modify
- tests/lib/suite-engine.sh (EDIT)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All RED tests from Task 1 now PASS (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-suite-engine-eagain.sh
- [ ] EAGAIN_PATTERN variable defined
  Verify: grep -q 'EAGAIN_PATTERN' tests/lib/suite-engine.sh
- [ ] _is_eagain_failure function exists
  Verify: grep -q '_is_eagain_failure' tests/lib/suite-engine.sh
- [ ] _retry_eagain_test function exists
  Verify: grep -q '_retry_eagain_test' tests/lib/suite-engine.sh
- [ ] Existing test suites still pass
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-suite-engine-basic.sh 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] No syntax errors
  Verify: bash -n tests/lib/suite-engine.sh
